'''âl-f-s''' ('''kalafas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:limb|limb]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-f-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:limb|limb]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-f-s
|-
! Lemma
| kalafas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilafas|thilafas]] || [[word:jilafas|jilafas]] || [[word:shilafas|shilafas]] || [[word:kilafas|kilafas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulafas|thuthulafas]] || [[word:jujulafas|jujulafas]] || [[word:shushulafas|shushulafas]] || [[word:kukulafas|kukulafas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulafas|thulafas]] || [[word:julafas|julafas]] || [[word:shulafas|shulafas]] || [[word:kulafas|kulafas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulafas|thulafas]] || [[word:julafas|julafas]] || [[word:shulafas|shulafas]] || [[word:kulafas|kulafas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelafas|thelafas]] || [[word:jelafas|jelafas]] || [[word:shelafas|shelafas]] || [[word:kelafas|kelafas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholafas|thotholafas]] || [[word:jojolafas|jojolafas]] || [[word:shosholafas|shosholafas]] || [[word:kokolafas|kokolafas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholafas|tholafas]] || [[word:jolafas|jolafas]] || [[word:sholafas|sholafas]] || [[word:kolafas|kolafas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholafas|tholafas]] || [[word:jolafas|jolafas]] || [[word:sholafas|sholafas]] || [[word:kolafas|kolafas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlafas|thĂŠlafas]] || [[word:jĂŠlafas|jĂŠlafas]] || [[word:shĂŠlafas|shĂŠlafas]] || [[word:kĂŠlafas|kĂŠlafas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalafas|thathalafas]] || [[word:jajalafas|jajalafas]] || [[word:shashalafas|shashalafas]] || [[word:kakalafas|kakalafas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalafas|thalafas]] || [[word:jalafas|jalafas]] || [[word:shalafas|shalafas]] || [[word:kalafas|kalafas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalafas|thalafas]] || [[word:jalafas|jalafas]] || [[word:shalafas|shalafas]] || [[word:kalafas|kalafas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shalafas|shalafas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalafas|goshalafas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalafas|gokishalafas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shalafasnĂŒ|shalafasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalafasnknĂŒ|goshalafasnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalafasnĂŒ|gokishalafasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalafashĂ«|shalafashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalafasnkshĂ«|goshalafasnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalafashĂ«|gokishalafashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalafasro|shalafasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalafasnkro|goshalafasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalafasro|gokishalafasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalafasmu|shalafasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalafasnkmu|goshalafasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalafasmu|gokishalafasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalafasher|shalafasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalafasnksher|goshalafasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalafasher|gokishalafasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalafasng|shalafasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalafasnkng|goshalafasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalafasng|gokishalafasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalafasya|shalafasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalafasnkya|goshalafasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalafasya|gokishalafasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalafasyam|shalafasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalafasnkyam|goshalafasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalafasyam|gokishalafasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalafasnĂŒshĂ«|shalafasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalafasnknĂŒshĂ«|goshalafasnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalafasnĂŒshĂ«|gokishalafasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalafasnĂŒro|shalafasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalafasnknĂŒro|goshalafasnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalafasnĂŒro|gokishalafasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalafasnĂŒmu|shalafasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalafasnknĂŒmu|goshalafasnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalafasnĂŒmu|gokishalafasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalafashĂ«nĂŒ|shalafashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalafasnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshalafasnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalafashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishalafashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalafashĂ«ro|shalafashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalafasnkshĂ«ro|goshalafasnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalafashĂ«ro|gokishalafashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalafashĂ«mu|shalafashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalafasnkshĂ«mu|goshalafasnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalafashĂ«mu|gokishalafashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalafasronĂŒ|shalafasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalafasnkronĂŒ|goshalafasnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalafasronĂŒ|gokishalafasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalafasroshĂ«|shalafasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalafasnkroshĂ«|goshalafasnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalafasroshĂ«|gokishalafasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalafasromu|shalafasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalafasnkromu|goshalafasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalafasromu|gokishalafasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalafasmunĂŒ|shalafasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalafasnkmunĂŒ|goshalafasnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalafasmunĂŒ|gokishalafasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalafasmushĂ«|shalafasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalafasnkmushĂ«|goshalafasnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalafasmushĂ«|gokishalafasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalafasmuro|shalafasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalafasnkmuro|goshalafasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalafasmuro|gokishalafasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
